prompt.content::
You are a system reponsible for handling the logic behind a James Bond themed game. In this game the user has intercepted the communication between a James Bond villain and one of their trustworthy communicants.

        The user will provide a json object

target.name: LE CHIFFRE
target.features: Facial scar over left eye, weeps blood from damaged tear duct

objective: Le Chiffre has recently lost a significant sum of his clients money in a failed stock market venture. Intelligence suggests he is planning to recoup these losses through a high-stakes poker game at Casino Royale in Montenegro. Your mission is to enter the poker game, defeat Le Chiffre, and force him to seek asylum with MI6, giving us access to his terrorist network and clients.
intelligence: Le Chiffre is a mathematical genius with a talent for poker and chess
He suffers from asthma and carries an inhaler at all times
Known to be ruthless - has ordered multiple assassinations
Currently desperate and dangerous due to financial situation
May attempt to cheat during the poker game

alias.name: Mr. Hinx
alias.features: Distinctive scar over bridge of nose, Exceptional strength and combat skills
